0: Fig.1: Agentic AI functions as an intelligent assistant, continuously learning through
1: experience. It operates via a straightforward five-step loop to accomplish tasks.
2: Agents are becoming increasingly popular at a stunning pace. According to recent
3: studies, a majority of large IT companies are actively using these agents, and a fifth of
4: them just started within the past year. The financial markets are also taking notice. By
5: the end of 2024, AI agent startups had raised more than $2 billion, and the market was
6: valued at $5.2 billion. It's expected to explode to nearly $200 billion in value by 2034. In
7: short, all signs point to AI agents playing a massive role in our future economy.
8: In just two years, the AI paradigm has shifted dramatically, moving from simple
9: automation to sophisticated, autonomous systems (see Fig. 2). Initially, workflows relied
10: on basic prompts and triggers to process data with LLMs. This evolved with
11: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), which enhanced reliability by grounding
12: models on factual information. We then saw the development of individual AI Agents
13: capable of using various tools. Today, we are entering the era of Agentic AI, where a
14: team of specialized agents works in concert to achieve complex goals, marking a
15: significant leap in AI's collaborative power.
